suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Fix documentation inaccuracy for 'fix-profile-bio-not-null' root cause. The bug is a TypeScript type issue (Profile.bio typed as null instead of string | null), NOT a database NOT NULL constraint. The database schema (backend/db/schema.ts) never had NOT NULL on bio column. Remove incorrect 'Profile bio NOT NULL constraint' description from any bug entries.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-profile-bio-not-null review found: 'bio TEXT,' in schema.ts without NOT NULL. Worker correctly fixed TypeScript types instead of database schema.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify service startup responsibilities: e2e-worker skill says 'Startup and cleanup are handled by worker-base', but workers often start services manually. Document when workers should vs shouldn't invoke services manually, or make worker-base handle ALL service lifecycle consistently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: e2e-protected-routes-comprehensive review: 'transcript shows: service.start backend, service.start frontend manually invoked. Skill says these are handled by worker-base.'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The convention for shared helpers in e2e/helpers.ts is aspirational but not implemented. Either create e2e/helpers.ts with registerUserWithoutProfile() and other helpers, or remove the convention from AGENTS.md to avoid confusion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: e2e-onboarding-comprehensive review: 'helpers.ts does not exist; worker defined helpers inline in test file.' e2e-protected-routes-comprehensive review: 'AGENTS.md says to create shared helpers in e2e/helpers.ts, but this file does not exist.'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Fix VAL-ONBOARD-003 description: says '500+ chars' but actual frontend has 50 char max (ProfileForm.tsx:91). Update contract to match actual behavior or coordinate with frontend to allow longer names.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: e2e-onboarding-comprehensive review: 'VAL-ONBOARD-003 description says 500+ chars but implementation uses 50 char max (matching actual frontend code at src/components/ProfileForm.tsx:91 maxLength={50})'
